author: LJ OS
description: Create Markdown-based trackers with tappable buttons that log timestamped rows to monthly CSV files, with summaries, dashboards, and settings-based editing. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: LJ Robinson
manifest.description: Create configurable one-tap tracker notes with CSV logs and monthly summaries.
manifest.name: TapLog

name: TapLog

releases.author: LJrobinson
releases.description:
TapLog is a one-tap tracker for Obsidian. Create tracker notes, tap buttons in Reading View, and log timestamped rows to monthly CSV files.

Highlights:
- Markdown tracker notes with taplog frontmatter as the source of truth
- Reading View button renderer for tracker notes
- Monthly CSV logging under TapLog/Logs/YYYY-MM/
- Auto-created folders, files, and CSV headers
- Built-in snack, cannabis, basic, and custom tracker creation
- Settings-based editor for existing trackers
- Compact button editor with Name, Value, and Logged value fields
- Button add/remove and logged value add/remove controls
- Friendly validation for tracker setup and editor mistakes
- Monthly tracker summaries and current-month rollup summary
- Tracker index and Markdown dashboard generation
- Mobile-friendly TapLog button styling

Known limitations:
- Persistent current values are not implemented yet.
- Advanced tracker fields may still require manual Markdown editing.
- Dashboard/index regeneration is manual.
releases.name: TapLog 1.0.0
